highlights.name: prx
highlights.description: The agent-run work-unit CLI: capability-scoped agents whose every privileged effect is verified against its signed owner, driving a work unit through one signed pipeline to a merged PR.

highlights.name: guest-room
highlights.description: Guest-agnostic room+door capability runtime — the core library claude-box is built on.

highlights.name: synoptic-github
highlights.description: A dynamic template that auto-updates your README to showcase all your GitHub projects, offering a concise overview of your coding journey 🌟✨

highlights.name: first-pass
highlights.description: A CLI tool that enhances your resume creation, aligns skills with job descriptions, and guides in building evidence-backed points 🚀📝

highlights.name: ssh-doctor
highlights.description: A Bash script that diagnoses SSH setup issues and provides streamlined troubleshooting 🩺🔧

highlights.name: site
highlights.description: The bounded.tools website — static, built on @bounded-systems/brand

highlights.name: .github
highlights.description: Org-level defaults and the public profile README for bounded-systems.

highlights.name: gh-project-room
highlights.description: Front Desk projection + sync room for bounded-systems (org project #2)

highlights.name: claude-token-tools
highlights.description: Claude Code token-saving toolkit — model-usage auditor + home-manager module

highlights.name: door-peercred
highlights.description: SO_PEERCRED helper for launcherd (Rust) — extracted from claude-box; a launcherd helper, not a door

highlights.name: door-net
highlights.description: netd — the allowlist-egress capability door, as a pinned OCI image (extracted from claude-box)

highlights.name: door-scout
highlights.description: scoutd — the external-read capability door, as a pinned OCI image (extracted from claude-box)
